name: Rain-Catcher

equipBonuses.name: Battlefield Tranquility
equipBonuses.description: When your health is above 50%, your Outgoing Healing is increased by 7,500. When your health is below 50%, your Critical Strike is increased by 7,500.

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Midnight Cowl

equipBonuses.name: Tangled Shadows
equipBonuses.description: You generate 20% less threat. When you use an encounter power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 5% of your max health. (20 second cooldown)

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Redcap's Cap

equipBonuses.name: Butcher's Frenzy
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Power by 1.3% and Movement Speed increased by 1% for 10 seconds. (Max stack 3)

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Turban of Shifting Sands

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Sandstorm
equipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, you pull all enemies within 25 feet towards you. You gain 5% Deflect Severity and their Accuracy is lowered by -2.5% for 6 seconds. (30 second cooldown) (Pull does not work in PvP)

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Raindrop Raiment

equipBonuses.name: Graceful Harmony
equipBonuses.description: You gain 1% Outgoing Healing for each player on your team. When your teammates are 20' or closer to you, their Forte is increased by 1%.

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Midnight's Grips

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Strike
equipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Control Bonus when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. After the stacks are consumed and you gain -1% Incoming Damage per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Wristguards of Precipitation

equipBonuses.name: Escalating Torrent
equipBonuses.description: Gain 375 Power for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Stacks 20 times.

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

name: Wasteland Merc's Leathers

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Defiance
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you take 3% less damage for 10 seconds. Cooldown 30 seconds.

source: Epic Dungeon - Vault of Stars - Hardcore

equipBonuses.name: Brute's Tactics

name: Just Hammer of the Blessed Blade · IL 650
displayName: Just Hammer of the Blessed Blade
setPartners: Faith Defense of the Blessed Blade
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, your weapons become Blessed, which increases your Power, Accuracy, Combat Advantage by 3% and grants you a random buff for 10 seconds, providing the following: Blessed Guidance — Increases your Critical Strike by 3%; Blessed Might — Increases your Action Point gain speed by 7.5%. Your weapons can only be Blessed once every 30 seconds.

name: Celestial Gavel of Justice · IL 650
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Divine Charge for 15 seconds. Once you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge, they are consumed and you are empowered with Divine Fury for 30 seconds, providing the following: +7.5% Base Damage Boost, +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Divine Fury at a time. The duration is refreshed each time you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge.
source: Trial - Zariel's Challenge
